# Alex Korbonits

> Personal blog covering machine learning, software engineering, and books.

## Blog

- [Hello, World!](https://korbonits.com/blog/2015-03-01-hello-world/)
- [Deep Learning In One Year](https://korbonits.com/blog/2015-03-07-deep-learning-in-one-year/)

- [Review of Artificial Intelligence: Rise of the Machines](https://korbonits.com/blog/2015-05-12-review-of-artificial-intelligence-rise-of-the-machines/)
- [Torch: Bleeding Edge DNN Research](https://korbonits.com/blog/2015-06-28-torch-bleeding-edge-dnn-research/)
- [Caffe: Brew Your First DNN](https://korbonits.com/blog/2015-07-29-caffe-brew-your-first-dnn/)
- [NIPS 2017 Summary](https://korbonits.com/blog/2017-12-11-nips-2017-summary/)
- [New Years Resolutions 2018](https://korbonits.com/blog/2018-01-05-new-years-resolutions/)
- [New Years Resolutions 2019](https://korbonits.com/blog/2019-01-01-new-years-resolutions-2019/)
- [2019 Retrospective](https://korbonits.com/blog/2020-01-01-retrospective-on-2019/)
- [National Poetry (Writing) Month](https://korbonits.com/blog/2020-03-31-national-poetry-writing-month/)
- [Q(uarantine) P(hysics)](https://korbonits.com/blog/2020-04-01-quarantine-physics/)
